_comment: Pre-vetted Ollama models for Solstone. Benchmarks are measured tok/s per canonical hardware class (see reference.json) and are populated via think.benchmark.harness on real hardware. An empty benchmarks dict means no measurement is available yet — the estimator falls back to confidence=unknown.

ollama-local/qwen3.5:35b-a3b-bf16.label: Qwen 3.5 35B (A3B, bf16) — MoE
ollama-local/qwen3.5:35b-a3b-bf16.notes: Large MoE (35B total, ~3B active). Matches think/models.py OLLAMA_PRO. Needs large unified memory (Spark) or multi-GPU.

ollama-local/qwen3.5:9b.label: Qwen 3.5 9B
ollama-local/qwen3.5:9b.notes: Matches think/models.py OLLAMA_FLASH. Good balance for tool-calling agents.

ollama-local/qwen3.5:2b.label: Qwen 3.5 2B
ollama-local/qwen3.5:2b.notes: Matches think/models.py OLLAMA_LITE. Lightweight generator; skip for cogitate.

ollama-local/qwen2.5vl:7b.label: Qwen 2.5 VL 7B — vision
ollama-local/qwen2.5vl:7b.notes: Vision-language candidate for the describe pipeline (Solstone AI Modalities §2). Smaller, wider compatibility.

ollama-local/qwen2.5vl:32b.label: Qwen 2.5 VL 32B — vision
ollama-local/qwen2.5vl:32b.notes: Middle-tier vision model — more capable than 7B, much faster than 72B on Spark (~10 tok/s vs ~4).

ollama-local/qwen2.5vl:72b.label: Qwen 2.5 VL 72B — vision
ollama-local/qwen2.5vl:72b.notes: Full-power vision model; target for Spark-class hardware. Note: severely memory-bandwidth-bound on Spark — qwen2.5vl:32b is ~2.3× faster for realtime use.
